docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,590.00 FILED BY ALLEN, SPENCER AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIS LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIS LEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEN, SPENCER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, WILLIS LEE $1,590.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,636.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
